title: Vanilla Food Types
description: A simple mod to add multiple vanilla style foods
body:
## Vanilla Food Types

Vanilla Minecraft lacks creative cooking. Pumpkins can only make pie. Eggs can't even be boiled. Vanilla Foods fixes this by adding over 20 new diverse recipes that expand uses for basic ingredients. Now pumpkins can make soups and tarts. Eggs can be cooked standalone or used in salads and baked goods. No more boring single uses for standard items. Vanilla Foods adds the recipe potential that should've been in the game all along.


- Apple Tart
- Berry Tart
- Chocolate
- Candy
- Chocolate Egg
- Marshmallow
- Cooked Marshmallow
- Toffee Apple
- Mushroom Pie
- Fish Pie
- Honey Cookie
- Berry Cookie
- Mushroom Salad
- Cooked Egg
- Cooked Carrot
- Cooked Bamboo
- Cooked Glowberrys
- Sushi
- Cooked Ferns
- Cordial
- Pumpkin Soup
- Carrot Soup
- Potato Soup

![All Food Items In A Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ToiKj0n3/images/aeaaf0b72e196d1a42ec22ab4f9c17a3721bea48.png)

Working on:

- Baked Apple

Feel free to use in modpacks :)
